message:
feat: Add Ghostty Metal terminal support with zell REPL

- Add interactive zell-repl.sh script for Ghostty terminal
- Ghostty provides full Metal GPU-accelerated terminal rendering
- REPL streams responses from zell server with color output
- Both terminal rendering and LLM inference use Metal GPU

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,50 @@
+#!/bin/bash
+# Zell interactive REPL
+# Runs in Ghostty with full Metal GPU terminal rendering
+
+ZELL_BIN="${ZELL_BIN:-/Users/steven_chong/Downloads/repos/zell/zig-out/bin/zell}"
+PORT="${ZELL_PORT:-11434}"
+
+# Colors
+GREEN='\033[1;32m'
+CYAN='\033[1;36m'
+RESET='\033[0m'
+
+echo -e "${GREEN}Zell Interactive Mode${RESET}"
+echo "GPU-accelerated LLM inference via Metal"
+echo "Type 'exit' to quit, 'models' to list models"
+echo ""
+
+while true; do
+    echo -ne "${CYAN}zell> ${RESET}"
+    read -r prompt
+
+    case "$prompt" in
+        exit|quit)
+            echo "Goodbye!"
+            exit 0
+            ;;
+        models)
+            echo "Fetching models..."
+            curl -s "http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/v1/models" 2>/dev/null | jq -r '.data[].id' 2>/dev/null || echo "Server not running. Start with: zell serve <model>"
+            ;;
+        "")
+            continue
+            ;;
+        *)
+            # Send to zell server
+            curl -sN "http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/v1/chat/completions" \
+                -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
+                -d "{\"model\":\"default\",\"messages\":[{\"role\":\"user\",\"content\":\"$prompt\"}],\"stream\":true}" 2>/dev/null | \
+                while IFS= read -r line; do
+                    if [[ "$line" == data:* ]]; then
+                        content=$(echo "${line#data: }" | jq -r '.choices[0].delta.content // empty' 2>/dev/null)
+                        if [[ -n "$content" ]]; then
+                            printf "%s" "$content"
+                        fi
+                    fi
+                done
+            echo ""
+            ;;
+    esac
+done
